messages.content: Right then, Tobias. What’s on your radar this fine Thursday morning?
what's the song by michael boob play that goes, birds flying high you know how i feel.
That would be "Feeling Good" by Michael Bublé. It starts exactly like that: "Birds flying high, you know how I feel." Classic track.
Right, Tobias, no need to thank me—just doing my job keeping the tune in your head and your plans on track. Anything else you want to tackle before noon strikes?
